items.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
items.summary: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation

items.title: Equal AI raises $30M to screen calls so Indians don’t have to
items.summary: Equal AI said that its AI-powered call assistant now has over a million monthly active users.

items.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
items.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

items.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
items.summary: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

items.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
items.summary: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

items.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
items.summary: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

items.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
items.summary: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

items.title: Bluesky launches group chats, as company shifts focus to community features
items.summary: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.

items.title: Meta’s Edits app is getting an AI assistant and a desktop version
items.summary: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.

items.title: Coinbase’s new tool can help agents trade and pay for premium research
items.summary: Coinbase's agent can use x402 protocol to get access to data and APIs.

items.title: Quantum Space’s military SPAC is trying to catch SpaceX’s IPO wave
items.summary: Quantum Space says SPACs aren't dead as it seeks a $1.2 billion deal to build military spacecraft.

items.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
items.summary: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

items.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
items.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

items.title: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations
items.summary: Members of the program, called "Waymo Premier," will have to pony up $29.99 per month.

items.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
items.summary: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

items.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
items.summary: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

items.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
items.summary: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

items.title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
items.summary: SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd is betting the ocean has vast amounts of untapped geothermal energy.

items.title: South Korea hits Coupang with $400M+ fine for data breach that affected millions
items.summary: South Korean authorities issued the record-breaking fine following a data breach that affected over 30 million customers.

items.title: Anthropic taps TCS to scale its enterprise AI deployments
items.summary: The partnership will see TCS creating a business unit focused on deploying Anthropic's AI models to its customers.
